pkgmetadata.longdescription:
HWMON driver for ASUS motherboards that expose sensor values through the embedded controller: chipset, CPU and motherboard temperatures, T_Sensor and water-block probes, CPU/chipset fan and water-pump speeds, and CPU current. These readings are not reachable through the Super I/O chip because the board firmware reserves that region via ACPI.
This is the out-of-tree tree from which the in-kernel asus-ec-sensors driver is fed. New boards are added here first and forwarded to the kernel afterwards, so it covers hardware that the running kernel may not yet know about.
